introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content1: Welcome to Quikkred. These Terms and Conditions govern your use of our services and form a binding legal agreement between you and Quikkred (a brand of Fluxusforge Private Limited, acting as Loan Service Provider), operating in partnership with Satsai Finlease Private Limited, a Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) registered with the Reserve Bank of India (RBI Registration No: B-14.01646).
introduction.content2: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility Criteria
eligibility.intro: To use our loan services, you must:
items: Be at least 21 years of age and not more than 65 years
Be an Indian citizen or resident
Have a valid PAN card and Aadhaar card
Have a minimum monthly income as specified for each loan product
Have a satisfactory credit score as determined by our credit assessment

interestRates.title: 3.1 Interest Rates
interestRates.content: Interest rates range from 10.99% to 24% per annum, calculated on a reducing balance basis. The exact rate will be determined based on your credit profile, loan amount, and tenure.

platformFees.title: 3.2 Platform fees
platformFees.content: A Platform fee of up to 3% of the loan amount (plus applicable taxes) will be charged at the time of loan disbursal.

prepayment.title: 3.3 Prepayment
prepayment.content: You may prepay your loan in full or in part after 3 EMIs. Prepayment charges may apply as per RBI guidelines.

privacySecurity.title: 4. Privacy and Security
privacySecurity.content: We take your privacy seriously. All personal and financial information provided is encrypted and stored securely. We comply with all applicable data protection laws and RBI guidelines.
privacySecurity.intro: Your information will only be used for:

default.title: 5. Default and Recovery
default.intro: In case of default (failure to pay EMI within 90 days of due date):
items: Late payment charges of 2% per month will be applied
Your credit score will be negatively impacted
Legal action may be initiated for recovery
The loan account may be classified as NPA as per RBI guidelines

dispute.title: 6. Dispute Resolution
dispute.intro: Any disputes arising out of these terms shall be resolved through:
items: Arbitration under the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996
Courts of Delhi shall have exclusive jurisdiction

amendments.title: 7. Amendments
amendments.content: Quikkred reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on our website. Continued use of our services after any modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: 8. Contact Information
contact.company: Quikkred (A brand of Fluxusforge Private Limited)
contact.address: 1008, 10th Floor, Vikrant Tower, Rajendra Place, New Delhi - 110005
